name: The Water
original_name: นทีร้อยเล่ห์
overview: When Apo Wathinwanit, the heir to the Wathin Group hotel chain, meets a troublemaker, Chonlada, the new receptionist who comes to cause chaos and change the life of a talented female executive who is always focused on work. A relationship full of tricks, between a game of hate and love, which will reach the finish line first?
